Package io.forja.components.charts.fxRadarChart

Class FxRadarChart.Builder

java.lang.Object
io.forja.builder.FxNodeBuilder<FxRadarChart,FxRadarChart.Builder>
io.forja.components.charts.fxRadarChart.FxRadarChart.Builder
Enclosing class:
FxRadarChart
public static class FxRadarChart.Builder extends FxNodeBuilder<FxRadarChart,FxRadarChart.Builder>
Fluent builder for constructing an FxRadarChart.

Defaults:

  • categories — empty
  • series — empty
  • max — 10
  • width / height — 240 / 240

      public FxRadarChart build()
      Description copied from class: FxNodeBuilder
      Constructs and returns the configured component.

      Implementations must call FxNodeBuilder.applyBase(Node) on the constructed node before returning it.
